meta.description: Wild Rift Mid Lane champion data – updated with QWER skill references and pick/avoid examples

champions.name: Ahri

goodAgainst.name: Akali
goodAgainst.note: Charm (E) can reveal her out of shroud (W)

badAgainst.name: Akali
badAgainst.note: Can outplay your charm with W

pickWhen: Need a safe blind pick
Team needs roam potential
Enemy has squishy champions (e.g., Lux, Ziggs, Jhin)
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy CC tanks (e.g., Galio, Kassadin)
Enemy has strong control mages (e.g., Orianna, Syndra)
champions.tips: Use E to interrupt engages. Roam with R advantage.

champions.name: Akali
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile squishy carries (e.g., Lux, Ziggs, Jhin)
Need a mobile assassin
You can snowball early
avoidWhen: Enemy has hard CC (e.g., Pantheon, Lissandra)
champions.tips: Use W to outplay. Passive auto for extra damage.

champions.name: Akshan
pickWhen: Need roam pressure and map presence
Team needs revival utility
Enemy has immobile mages (e.g., Lux, Veigar)
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy CC burst (e.g., Pantheon, Lissandra)
Enemy has strong poke mages (e.g., Syndra, Ziggs)
champions.tips: Use E (grapple) to roam. Passive revive is game-changing.

champions.name: Ambessa
pickWhen: Need dive potential and sustain
Enemy has melee champions (e.g., Yasuo, Diana, Irelia)
Your team needs a secondary engage
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy poke (e.g., Lux, Ziggs, Syndra)
Enemy has ranged mages that can kite you
champions.tips: Build sustain items. Dive backline in teamfights.

champions.name: Annie
pickWhen: Need reliable burst and teamfight engage
Enemy is immobile (e.g., Lux, Veigar, Ziggs)
You want a simple but effective mid laner
avoidWhen: Enemy has high mobility (e.g., Fizz, Akali, Zed)
champions.tips: Stack stun passive (4 abilities). Flash + R (Tibbers) for engage.

champions.name: Aurelion Sol
pickWhen: Need teamfight control and AoE damage
Need roam pressure with E
Enemy has immobile mages (e.g., Lux, Ziggs)
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile assassins (e.g., Zed, Fizz, Akali)
Your team needs early game pressure
champions.tips: Use E to roam. Stars (passive) do damage around you.

champions.name: Aurora
pickWhen: Need mobile burst and flex pick
Enemy has immobile mages (e.g., Lux, Veigar)
You want to outplay skillshots
avoidWhen: Enemy has strong control mages (e.g., Orianna, Syndra)
champions.tips: Position aggressively. Use mobility to dodge skillshots.

champions.name: Azir

goodAgainst.name: Yasuo
goodAgainst.note: Soldiers (W) zone him; R blocks his engage

goodAgainst.name: Zed
goodAgainst.note: R pushes him away; soldiers zone his shadows

goodAgainst.name: Lux
goodAgainst.note: Out-ranges her; E (slow) makes Q easy to hit

badAgainst.name: Fizz
badAgainst.note: Dodges soldiers with E; bursts you

badAgainst.name: Akali
badAgainst.note: Dodges soldiers with W; dives you

badAgainst.name: Kassadin
badAgainst.note: Out-scales you; can dive you post-6

strengths: Strong teamfight engage with R (Shurima Shuffle)
synergies: Engage supports (Leona, Nautilus) – can follow up on your R
Frontline tanks (Ornn, Malphite) – protect you while you DPS
ADC follow-up (Jinx, Twitch) – benefits from your peel
avoidSynergies: No frontline – you're immobile and squishy
Full dive comps – you need peel to survive
pickWhen: Need a control mage with long-range poke and DPS
Enemy has immobile champions (e.g., Lux, Orianna, Syndra)
Your team has frontline to protect you
You need a strong teamfight engage with R (Shurima Shuffle)
Enemy has melee champions you can kite with soldiers (W)
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile assassins (e.g., Fizz, Akali, Zed)
Enemy has hard engage that can dive you (e.g., Diana, Galio)
You are not confident in soldier (W) positioning
champions.tips: Position soldiers (W) aggressively to poke with Q. Use E (dash) + Q for escape or engage. R (Emperor's Divide) can knock enemies into your team or peel divers. Late game, you are a hypercarry – position safely and DPS with soldiers.

champions.name: Corki
pickWhen: Need hybrid damage (AP + AD)
Team needs mixed damage to avoid armor/MR stacking
Enemy is squishy
avoidWhen: Enemy has pure tanks (e.g., Malphite, Rammus)
Enemy has heavy engage that can dive you
champions.tips: Package (passive) is game-changing. Use it for objectives.

champions.name: Diana
pickWhen: Need dive potential and AP burst
Enemy has immobile mages (e.g., Lux, Ziggs, Orianna)
Your team needs engage
avoidWhen: Enemy has strong CC (e.g., Pantheon, Galio)
Enemy has peel supports (e.g., Janna, Lulu)
champions.tips: Use Q to poke, E to engage. R pulls enemies in.

champions.name: Ekko
pickWhen: Need skill expression and outplay potential
Enemy has immobile mages (e.g., Lux, Orianna)
You want a safe assassin with escape
avoidWhen: Enemy has lockdown CC (e.g., Pantheon, Lissandra)
champions.tips: Use W for shield/stun. R to undo damage.

champions.name: Fizz
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile mages (e.g., Lux, Ziggs, Orianna)
Need a mobile assassin with dive potential
You want to snowball early
avoidWhen: Enemy has hard CC (e.g., Pantheon, Lissandra)
champions.tips: Use E to dodge. Q through enemies for damage.

champions.name: Galio
pickWhen: Enemy has AP champions (e.g., Syndra, Ahri, Akali)
Need roam pressure and peel
Your team needs a frontline tank
avoidWhen: Enemy has AD pressure (e.g., Jayce, Yasuo, Lucian)
champions.tips: Use R to save teammates. W (taunt) into your team.

champions.name: Gragas
pickWhen: Need a flex pick (mid, top, jungle, support)
Need CC and sustain
Enemy has assassins you can tank
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy poke (e.g., Orianna, Syndra, Lux)
Your team needs pure damage carry
Enemy has mobile comps that kite you
champions.tips: Use Q (barrel) to poke and slow. R to engage or disengage.

champions.name: Heimerdinger
pickWhen: Need zone control and poke
Enemy has melee pushers (e.g., Yasuo, Zed)
Team needs waveclear
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile burst (e.g., Fizz, Akali)
Enemy can kill turrets easily (e.g., Lucian, Akshan)
champions.tips: Place turrets (Q) for vision and damage. Use E (grenade) for stun.

champions.name: Irelia
pickWhen: Enemy has immobile mages (e.g., Lux, Orianna, Ziggs)
Need a mobile fighter with sustain
You can abuse Q resets on minions
avoidWhen: Enemy has hard CC (e.g., Pantheon, Lissandra)
Enemy can kite you (e.g., Syndra, Orianna)
champions.tips: Stack passive for DPS. Use Q to reset on minions.

champions.name: Jayce
pickWhen: Need skill-based poke
Enemy is squishy (e.g., Lux, Zed, Fizz)
Team needs siege potential
champions.tips: Use ranged form (Q) for poke, melee form for burst. Combo forms.

champions.name: Karma
pickWhen: Need utility and poke
Enemy has assassins you can shield against (e.g., Zed, Akali)
Your team needs a supportive mid
avoidWhen: Enemy has long-range poke (e.g., Syndra, Lux)
champions.tips: Mantra (R) + E for big shield + speed. Mantra (R) + Q for poke.

champions.name: Kassadin
pickWhen: Game will go late
Enemy has AP champions (e.g., Ahri, Syndra, Lux)
Your team has frontline to protect you
avoidWhen: Enemy has early AD pressure (e.g., Jayce, Lucian, Pantheon)
Your team needs early game pressure
champions.tips: Farm safely early. Late game spam R.

champions.name: Katarina
pickWhen: Need reset teamfights
Enemy has low CC (e.g., Lux, Ziggs, Ahri)
Your team has AoE engage (e.g., Amumu, Malphite)
avoidWhen: Enemy has strong CC (e.g., Galio, Pantheon)
Enemy has tanks that survive your burst
champions.tips: Wait for CC before using R. Resets are your win condition.

champions.name: Kayle
pickWhen: Game will go late
Need a hypercarry
Your team can protect you (e.g., Lulu, Braum)
avoidWhen: Enemy has early dive (e.g., Pantheon, Diana)
Your team needs early game pressure
Enemy has strong early game comp
champions.tips: Survive early. Late game R for invulnerability.

champions.name: Kennen
pickWhen: Need teamfight ult (R) for AoE stun
Need poke in lane
Enemy clumps up in teamfights
avoidWhen: Enemy can disengage easily (e.g., Janna, Gragas)
champions.tips: Flash + R to stun entire team. Passive for stun stacks.

champions.name: Lucian
pickWhen: Need early pressure and roam
Enemy has immobile mages (e.g., Ahri, Orianna, Syndra)
Your team needs AD damage
avoidWhen: Your team needs late game scaling
champions.tips: Win early lane. Roam with R.

champions.name: Lux
pickWhen: Need safe poke and vision control
Enemy is immobile (e.g., Ahri, Orianna, Veigar)
Your team needs CC setup
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile assassins (e.g., Akali, Zed, Fizz)
champions.tips: Q + E + R is your kill combo. Shield (W) before trades.

champions.name: Morgana
pickWhen: Need black shield (E) against engage/assassins
Enemy has engage comps (e.g., Zed, Akali, Fizz)
Your team needs CC and utility
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile champions (e.g., Ezreal, Lucian)
Enemy has long-range poke (e.g., Syndra, Orianna)
champions.tips: Black shield (E) key targets. Q to catch enemies.

champions.name: Nidalee
pickWhen: Need poke and mobility
Enemy has immobile mages (e.g., Lux, Ziggs)
Your team needs sustain (heal)
champions.tips: Land spears (Q) for damage. Use heal (E) to sustain.

champions.name: Orianna
pickWhen: Need teamfight control and utility
Your team has engage to set up your R
Enemy has immobile melee champions (e.g., Yasuo, Yone)
avoidWhen: Enemy has early all-in dive (e.g., Diana, Gragas)
Enemy has hyper mobile assassins (e.g., Kassadin, Ahri)
champions.tips: Ball (Q) placement is key. R when enemies are grouped.

champions.name: Pantheon
pickWhen: Need early game pressure and roam
Enemy has squishy assassins (e.g., Akali, Zed, Fizz)
Your team needs an early game leader
champions.tips: Use R to roam. Empowered W gives stun.

champions.name: Rumble
pickWhen: Need teamfight control and zone (R)
Need AP damage and poke
Enemy has immobile melee champions
avoidWhen: Enemy can displace you (e.g., Gragas, Alistar)
champions.tips: Manage heat for empowered abilities. R for zone control.

champions.name: Ryze
pickWhen: Need safe scaling and waveclear
Enemy has assassins you can lock down with W (rune prison)
Your team needs control mage
avoidWhen: Enemy has early pressure (e.g., Pantheon, Diana)
champions.tips: Use W (rune prison) to lock down. Farm to scale.

champions.name: Seraphine
pickWhen: Need teamfight utility (shields, heals, root)
Your team needs AP damage and control
Enemy has engage comp you can kite
avoidWhen: Enemy has early kill lanes (e.g., Zed, Akali, Fizz)
Your team needs solo carry damage
champions.tips: Double cast E for root, W for heal. R is game-changing.

champions.name: Singed
pickWhen: Need cheese pick
Need split push pressure
Enemy has immobile melee assassins
avoidWhen: Enemy has ranged champions (e.g., Lux, Ziggs)
champions.tips: Proxy farm. Fling (E) enemies into your team.

champions.name: Smolder
pickWhen: Game will go late
Need hypercarry
Your team can protect you (e.g., Lulu, Braum)
avoidWhen: Enemy has early burst (e.g., Zed, Fizz, Akali)
Your team needs early game pressure
champions.tips: Stack passive for true damage. Position safely.

champions.name: Swain
pickWhen: Need sustain and teamfight presence
Enemy has assassins you can pull (e.g., Zed, Akali, Fizz)
Your team has frontline
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile kite (e.g., Lucian, Akshan, Ezreal)
champions.tips: Pull (E) enemies into your team. Use R in teamfights.

champions.name: Syndra
pickWhen: Need pick potential and burst
Enemy has low mobility (e.g., Lux, Veigar, Ahri)
Your team has frontline
avoidWhen: Enemy has high mobility (e.g., Akali, Zed, Fizz)
champions.tips: Use Q + E for stun. R for execute.

champions.name: Talon
pickWhen: Need roam pressure and burst
Enemy is squishy (e.g., Lux, Orianna, Ahri)
Your team needs AD assassin
champions.tips: Use E to roam. Passive for bleed damage.

champions.name: Teemo
pickWhen: Need vision control (shrooms)
Enemy has melee auto-attackers (e.g., Yasuo, Yone)
Need poke and map control
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile champions (e.g., Akali, Zed)
champions.tips: Place shrooms (R) for vision. Q (blind) key auto attackers.

champions.name: Tristana
pickWhen: Need scaling damage and tower pressure
Enemy has immobile mages (e.g., Ahri, Orianna, Syndra)
Your team has peel
avoidWhen: Enemy has early dive (e.g., Diana, Pantheon)
champions.tips: Use E + auto for burst. W to jump/reset.

champions.name: Twisted Fate
pickWhen: Need map pressure and global presence
Your team needs side lane pressure
Enemy has immobile champions
avoidWhen: Enemy has burst assassins (e.g., Fizz, Zed, Akali)
champions.tips: Use R to roam. Pick gold card (W) for stun.

champions.name: Veigar
pickWhen: Game will go late
Enemy has assassins you can cage (e.g., Zed, Akali, Fizz)
Your team needs scaling AP damage
avoidWhen: Enemy has early roamers (e.g., Twisted Fate, Akshan)
Your team needs early game pressure
champions.tips: Use E (cage) to zone. Stack passive for AP.

champions.name: Vex
pickWhen: Enemy has dash-heavy comp (e.g., Yasuo, Yone, Akali, Zed)
Need anti-mobility and burst
Your team has engage
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy poke (e.g., Lux, Ziggs)
champions.tips: Passive fears dashed enemies. R for execute.

champions.name: Viego
pickWhen: Need flex pick (mid or jungle)
Need possession value in teamfights
Your team needs bruiser damage
avoidWhen: Enemy has lockdown CC (e.g., Pantheon, Lissandra)
champions.tips: Possess enemies for extra value. Build bruiser.

champions.name: Vladimir
pickWhen: Game will go late
Need scaling sustain and AP damage
Enemy has no early all-in
avoidWhen: Enemy has early all-in (e.g., Pantheon, Diana)
Your team needs early game pressure
champions.tips: Pool (W) to dodge. Late game massive sustain.

champions.name: Yasuo
pickWhen: Team has knockups (e.g., Malphite, Gragas, Nautilus)
Need scaling carry
Enemy has immobile mages (e.g., Lux, Ahri, Ziggs)
avoidWhen: No knockup synergy on your team
champions.tips: Stack Q for tornado. R requires knockup setup.

champions.name: Yone
pickWhen: Team has knockups (e.g., Malphite, Gragas)
Need scaling carry
Enemy has immobile mages (e.g., Lux, Ahri, Ziggs)
avoidWhen: No knockup synergy on your team
champions.tips: Second Q knockup. E for engage/disengage.

champions.name: Zed
pickWhen: Enemy is squishy (e.g., Lux, Orianna, Ahri)
Need mobile assassin
You can snowball early
champions.tips: Use shadows (W) to outplay. R for execute damage.

champions.name: Ziggs
pickWhen: Need poke and siege
Need waveclear
Enemy has immobile melee champions (e.g., Yasuo, Yone)
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile assassins (e.g., Akali, Fizz, Zed)
champions.tips: Use R for waveclear or objectives. W to siege towers.

champions.name: Zoe
pickWhen: Need skill expression and poke
Enemy is immobile (e.g., Lux, Veigar, Ahri)
Your team needs pick potential
champions.tips: Use E (sleep) to set up. Q + R for long-range poke.

champions.name: Zyra
pickWhen: Need plant setup and zone control
Enemy has melee champions (e.g., Yasuo, Zed, Fizz)
Your team needs AP damage and CC
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile champions (e.g., Akali, Kassadin)
champions.tips: Place plants (W) for poke. E + W + Q for combo.

draftRules.text: Assassins like Zed, Fizz, and Akali excel against immobile mages. Look for early kill pressure.
Control mages like Galio and Vex counter assassins with CC and survivability. Consider building Zhonya's.
Engage junglers pair well with burst/control mids like Ahri, Orianna, and Syndra for easy follow-up.
Galio is a strong counter to AP-heavy team comps. Consider an AD mid like Zed, Yasuo, or Lucian.
Tanky champions like Malphite and Galio can neutralize AD assassins with armor/MR and CC.
Scaling mids like Kassadin and Veigar struggle against early game roamers. Play safe and farm.
Vex's passive counters dash-heavy champions. Pick her into mobile team comps.
Squishy mages and assassins need frontline. Consider Galio or a tankier mid pick.
Global roamers will pressure side lanes. Warn your team and match their roams.
Kassadin outscales most AP mids. Pick an AD mid (Zed, Lucian) or apply early pressure to delay his scaling.
Yasuo needs knockup setup for his ultimate. Ensure your team has reliable knockups (e.g., Malphite, Gragas, Nautilus).
